---
title: "A working plugin marketplace"
description: "chrissweet/csweet-skills-marketplace packages two plugins from the AI_skills wiki, validated end to end with the Claude Code CLI."
date: "2026-07-19"
categories: [field-notes, marketplace]
draft: false
---

::: {.callout-note title="Status"}
**Built and demonstrated.** This runs today; caveats are noted inline.
:::

**What happened.** It proves the marketplace-plugin delivery leg: discovery abstracts over whether a capability resolves to a connector you call or a plugin you install.

**Why it matters.** chrissweet/csweet-skills-marketplace packages two plugins from the AI_skills wiki, validated end to end with the Claude Code CLI.

**Details.** Drawn from the wiki's Skills-Marketplace-POC. Caveat: only install-from-local was exercised end to end.
